Number Plate OCR

AI-Powered License Plate Recognition

FeaturesHow it WorksAbout

Extract Text fromNumber Plates

Upload an image of a vehicle number plate and get instant, accurate text extraction using advanced OCR technology powered by computer vision.

Easy Upload

Simply drag and drop or click to upload your number plate image

Instant Processing

Advanced AI algorithms process your image in seconds

Secure & Private

Your images are processed securely and not stored permanently

Upload Number Plate Image

Upload Number Plate Image

Drag and drop or click to browse

Supports: JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, WebP (Max 10MB)

💡 Tips for better results:

  • • Ensure the number plate is clearly visible and well-lit
  • • Avoid blurry or heavily angled images
  • • Higher resolution images generally work better
  • • Make sure the plate text is not obscured by shadows or reflections
